---
title: TVB-O
jupyter: python3
---


## 1. Dynamical System


```{python}
from tvbo import Dynamics, SimulationExperiment
import bsplot

# Pendulum System
dynamics_yaml = """
name: PendulumSystem
parameters:
    c:
        value: 0.001
        unit: 1/ms
    omega0:
        value: 0.01
        unit: rad/ms
    L:
        value: 1.0
        unit: m

state_variables:
    theta:
        unit: rad
        initial_value: 1.0
        equation:
            rhs: omega
    omega:
        unit: rad/ms
        initial_value: 0.0
        equation:
            rhs: -c*omega - omega0**2 * sin(theta)
"""

pendulum = SimulationExperiment(
    dynamics=Dynamics.from_string(dynamics_yaml),
)
results = pendulum.run(duration=5_000)
results
```

```{python}
results.integration.data
```

```{python}
results.integration.sel(variable='theta').plot()
```

## Derived Variables

```{python}
from tvbo.datamodel.schema import DerivedVariable
pendulum.dynamics.derived_variables["x"] = DerivedVariable(
    name="x",
    equation={"rhs": "L * sin(theta)"},
    unit="m",
    description="X coordinate of the pendulum bob",
)
pendulum.dynamics.derived_variables["y"] = DerivedVariable(
    name="y",
    equation={"rhs": "-L * cos(theta)"},
    unit="m",
    description="Y coordinate of the pendulum bob",
)
```

```{python}
pendulum.dynamics.derived_variables
```

```{python}
res2 = pendulum.run()

res2.integration.sel(variable=["x", "y"]).plot()
```

```{python}
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.gridspec as gridspec
from matplotlib import animation
from IPython.display import HTML
import numpy as np

dt = pendulum.integration.step_size
skip_frames = max(1, int(1000 / 20 / dt))

t = res2.integration.time.values
theta = res2.integration.data.sel(variable="theta").values.squeeze()
omega = res2.integration.data.sel(variable="omega").values.squeeze()
x = res2.integration.data.sel(variable="x").values.squeeze()
y = res2.integration.data.sel(variable="y").values.squeeze()

frames = range(0, len(t), skip_frames)

fig = plt.figure(figsize=(10, 6))
gs = gridspec.GridSpec(2, 2, height_ratios=[1, 1.4], hspace=0.45, wspace=0.35)

# --- row 0: timeseries ---
ax_theta = fig.add_subplot(gs[0, 0])
ax_omega = fig.add_subplot(gs[0, 1])

ax_theta.set_xlim(t[0], t[-1])
ax_theta.set_ylim(theta.min() - 0.1, theta.max() + 0.1)
ax_theta.set_xlabel("t (ms)")
ax_theta.set_ylabel(r"$\theta$ (rad)")
ax_theta.set_title(r"$\theta(t)$")

ax_omega.set_xlim(t[0], t[-1])
ax_omega.set_ylim(omega.min() - 0.01, omega.max() + 0.01)
ax_omega.set_xlabel("t (ms)")
ax_omega.set_ylabel(r"$\omega$ (rad/ms)")
ax_omega.set_title(r"$\omega(t)$")

(line_theta,) = ax_theta.plot([], [], lw=1.5, color="steelblue")
(dot_theta,) = ax_theta.plot([], [], "o", color="steelblue", ms=5)
(line_omega,) = ax_omega.plot([], [], lw=1.5, color="darkorange")
(dot_omega,) = ax_omega.plot([], [], "o", color="darkorange", ms=5)

# --- row 1: pendulum ---
ax_pend = fig.add_subplot(gs[1, :])
L = float(pendulum.dynamics.parameters["L"].value)
ax_pend.set_xlim(-L * 1.3, L * 1.3)
ax_pend.set_ylim(-L * 1.3, L * 0.3)
ax_pend.set_aspect("equal")
ax_pend.set_xlabel("x (m)")
ax_pend.set_ylabel("y (m)")
ax_pend.set_title("Pendulum")
ax_pend.plot(0, 0, "k+", ms=10, mew=2)  # pivot

(rod,) = ax_pend.plot([], [], "o-", color="gray", lw=2)
(trail,) = ax_pend.plot([], [], "-", color="gray", lw=0.8, alpha=0.4)
trail_len = 200


def animate(i):
    ti = list(frames)[i]
    # timeseries up to current frame
    line_theta.set_data(t[:ti], theta[:ti])
    dot_theta.set_data([t[ti]], [theta[ti]])
    line_omega.set_data(t[:ti], omega[:ti])
    dot_omega.set_data([t[ti]], [omega[ti]])
    # pendulum rod + bob
    rod.set_data([0, x[ti]], [0, y[ti]])
    # trail
    start = max(0, ti - trail_len)
    trail.set_data(x[start:ti], y[start:ti])
    return line_theta, dot_theta, line_omega, dot_omega, rod, trail


ani = animation.FuncAnimation(
    fig,
    animate,
    frames=len(frames),
    interval=dt * skip_frames,
    blit=True,
    repeat=True,
)
plt.close()
HTML(ani.to_jshtml())
```

### Dynamics Database

```{python}
Dynamics.db_overview()
```

```{python}
g2d = Dynamics.from_db('Generic2dOscillator')
```

## Networks

```{python}
from tvbo import Network

Vnet = Network.from_string("""
label: Visual Pathway

nodes:
- id: 0
  label: V1
- id: 1
  label: V2
- id: 2
  label: MT

edges:
  - source: 0
    target: 1
    parameters:
      weight:
        value: 0.7
      distance:
        value: 25
        unit: mm

  - source: 1
    target: 2
    parameters:
      weight:
        value: 0.4
      distance:
        value: 40
        unit: mm

  - source: 2
    target: 0

    directed: True
    parameters:
      weight:
        value: 0.2
      distance:
        value: 60
        unit: mm
""")
Vnet.plot_overview()
```

```{python}
import numpy as np

W = np.array([
    [0.0, 0.5, 0.3, 0.0],
    [0.5, 0.0, 0.8, 0.2],
    [0.3, 0.8, 0.0, 0.6],
    [0.0, 0.2, 0.6, 0.0],
])

L = np.array([
    [0,  50, 80,  0],
    [50,  0, 30, 70],
    [80, 30,  0, 40],
    [0,  70, 40,  0],
])

Mnet = Network.from_matrix(W, lengths=L, labels=["V1", "V2", "MT", "PFC"])
Mnet.plot_graph()
```

```{python}
Network.list_db(rec='dTOR', atlas='DesikanKilliany')
```

```{python}
lobar = Network.from_db(atlas='Lobar8', rec='avgMatrix')
lobar
```

```{python}
lobar.plot_overview(log_weights=True)
```

```{python}
lobar.save("/Users/leonmartin_bih/Downloads")
```

## Network Dynamics

```{python}
g2d.coupling_inputs
```

```{python}
from IPython.display import Markdown
Markdown(g2d.render('report'))
```

```{python}
from tvbo import SimulationExperiment

exp = SimulationExperiment(dynamics=g2d, network=Vnet)
exp.dynamics.parameters['a'].value = 1.0
exp.coupling.parameters['a'].value = -1
```

```{python}
res = exp.run()
```

```{python}
res.integration.time
```

```{python}
ani = res.integration.sel(variable='V').animate()

ani.save("_ouput/3Node_G2d.gif")
```

![]("_ouput/3Node_G2d.gif")

```{python}
type(res.integration.sel(variable='V'))
```

```{python}
res.integration.sel(variable='V').shape
```

```{python}
res.source.integration.step_size
```
